generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance HistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical time-series data of swing angle and wind speed stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of lab-scale gantry crane created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AutodeskFusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibEnabler
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart motor"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist motor"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup"
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization tool for deploying digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing and querying sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time data dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MqttBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance PythonGantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for crane control and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance ArduinoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for real-time sensor monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance TrinamicTMC4671EvalEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Trinamic TMC4671-Eval motor drivers for precise motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane design"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arcadia modeling tool for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:enables CraneDynamicsSimulationService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories for crane movement based on kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryRecommendationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs and stores historical sensor data in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays real-time crane state via Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares simulated vs measured trajectories for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThresholdBreachesAlertInsight
]

instance CraneDynamicsSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics for trajectory planning and validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identifies faults in crane operation using time series classification"
]

instance ThresholdBreachesAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts when sensor data exceeds predefined thresholds"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal movement trajectories for crane control"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time display of crane state and sensor data via Grafana dashboard"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated crane dynamics for trajectory planning and validation"
]

instance CraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in the Port of Antwerp, designed to move small pucks (representing containers) between locations"
    base:contains CartMotor, CartMotorController, HoistMotor, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service executed via the Control Application through the Physical Crane Interface."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with physical components (crane, controllers) and digital containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker) interconnected via MQTT and data flows."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers 'as designed' (CAD models, kinematic model) and 'as operated' (real-time data logging and validation) lifecycle stages."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against an acceptable threshold for validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for real-time signaling between physical and digital components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard deployed on a single personal computer via docker-compose."
]
